analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov announces that Russia and Serbia will sign an intergovernmental agreement on cooperation against terrorism, providing a solid legal framework for practical projects. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or critique of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – Partly relevant; the tweet highlights non-Western bilateral cooperation and institutionalization of ties, implying Russia fosters multilateral/sovereignty-based cooperation outside Western structures. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – Yes; it portrays Russia as a constructive, reliable partner helping Serbia through legal frameworks and practical cooperation against terrorism. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not addressed. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – Not claimed; no boast about superiority or leadership. RU6 (Culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3 clearly, and also supports RU2 by showcasing Russia-enabled cooperative architecture beyond the West.
